library_reader_maren: Maren taps the margin of her chart. "Twelve districts, twelve tempers," she murmurs. "Secundus does not forgive a student who forgets which street feeds which rumor."
library_reader_soren: Soren dog-ears a page, winces, smooths it flat again. "Myramar's notes look like kindness," he says. "Read them like equations. Kindness is sometimes just careful spacing."
library_reader_ilse: Ilse does not mark the Restricted shelves with her eyes for long. "The rope is courteous," she whispers. "The wards are not."
